allow: Bash(cd D:/dlicom-events && mkdir -p src/commands src/events src/handlers)
Bash(cd D:/dlicom-events && npm init -y && npm install discord.js better-sqlite3 dotenv)
Bash(grep -r "setCustomId\\|setLabel" /d/dlicom-events/src/handlers/*.js | grep -o "setLabel\('[^']*'\)\\|setCustomId\('[^']*'\)" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -30)
Bash(grep -ro "setLabel\('[^']*'\)" /d/dlicom-events/src/handlers/*.js | sed "s/setLabel\('\\|'//g" | while read line; do echo "${#line}: $line"; done | sort -rn | head -5)
Bash(grep -ro "setCustomId\('[^']*'\)" /d/dlicom-events/src/handlers/*.js | sed "s/setCustomId\('\\|'//g" | while read line; do echo "${#line}: $line"; done | sort -rn | head -10)
